hero.tagline: Cofa kanye ukuze ufumane umdlalo wakho olandelayo.

roles.heading: I-app enye kuye wonke umntu
roles.subheading: Nokuba ufuna nje ukujonga, ukujoyina umdlalo, okanye ukulawula yonke into – Footeee ikugqumile.

guest.title: Undwendwe
guest.longDescription: Jonga yonke imidlalo ezayo, bona iinkcukacha zendawo, kwaye ujonge ukufumaneka kwabadlali – konke ngaphandle kweakhawunti. Ilungele abathandi abangazihluphi kakhulu.

player.title: Umdlali
player.description: Ukungena kwakho ebaleni kusele imizuzu embalwa nje!
player.longDescription: Joyina imidlalo ngocofo olunye, bona abanye abadlalayo, kwaye ufumane izaziso xa kuvuleka indawo okanye xa umdlalo sele uza kuqala.

manager.title: Umphathi
manager.description: Yeka Footeee ilawule ihlabathi lakho lebhola!
manager.longDescription: Ulawulo olupheleleyo kwimidlalo, amaqela, nabadlali. Yenza imidlalo, cwangcisa amaqela, landela ukuhamba, kwaye ulawule uluntu lwakho lwebhola.

privacy.title: Umgaqo-nkqubo Wobumfihlo
privacy.intro: Footeee ("thina", "yethu") isebenzisa i-app yeselula ye-Footeee ("i-App") nale webhusayithi. Lo Mgaqo-nkqubo Wobumfihlo uchaza indlela esiqokelela ngayo, esisebenzisa ngayo, esityhila ngayo, kwaye esikhusela ngayo inkcazelo yakho xa usebenzisa i-App neenkonzo ezinxulumeneyo.
privacy.section1Item1: Inkcazelo yeakhawunti (umz., igama, idilesi ye-imeyile, iziqinisekiso zokungena ngendlela ekhuselekileyo).
privacy.section1Item2: Inkcazelo yokusetyenziswa kwe-app (umz., imidlalo oyenzileyo/oye wayijoyina, amaqela, iindawo, kunye nokusebenzelana).
privacy.section1Item3: Idatha yesixhobo/yobugcisa (umz., uhlobo lwesixhobo, uhlobo lwe-OS, uhlobo lwe-app, uvavanyo).
privacy.section2Item2: Ukunikezela ngeempawu ezisisiseko ezifana nokwenza imidlalo, ukujoyina, nokulawula amaqela.
privacy.section3Text: Sinokwabelana ngenkcazelo kuphela njengoko kuyimfuneko ukusebenzisa inkonzo, ukuthobela izibopho zomthetho, okanye ukukhusela amalungelo nokhuseleko. Umzekelo, sinokusebenzisa abanikezeli beziseko (ukusingatha, i-imeyile, njl.) abacubungula idatha egameni lethu phantsi kokhuselo olufanelekileyo.
privacy.section4Text: Sisebenzisa amanyathelo obugcisa nawolungelelwaniso afanelekileyo ukukhusela inkcazelo yakho (umz., HTTPS, ulawulo lokufikelela). Akukho ndlela yokuthumela okanye yokugcina ekhuseleke ngokupheleleyo nge-100%, ngoko ke asinako ukuqinisekisa ukhuseleko olupheleleyo.
privacy.section5Text: Sigcina inkcazelo yobuqu ixesha elide njengoko kuyimfuneko ukunikezela inkonzo nangeenjongo zoshishino ezisemthethweni (umz., ukuthobela, ukhuseleko, ukusombulula iimbambano), ngaphandle kokuba umthetho ufuna ixesha elide lokugcina.
privacy.section6Text: Ngokuxhomekeke kwindawo yakho (kuquka i-UK/EU), unokuba namalungelo okufikelela, ukulungisa, ukucima, okanye ukuthintela ukusetyenzwa kwedatha yakho yobuqu, kunye nokucela ukudluliselwa. Ukusebenzisa la malungelo, qhagamshelana nathi.
privacy.section7Text: Footeee ayenzelwanga abantwana abangaphantsi kweminyaka eyi-13. Asiqokeleli ngabom inkcazelo yobuqu kubantwana abangaphantsi kwe-13.
privacy.section8Text: Sinokuhlaziya lo mgaqo-nkqubo amaxesha ngamaxesha. Izihlaziyo ziya kupapashwa kweli phepha kunye nomhla ohlaziyiweyo wokuthi "Uhlaziyo lokugqibela".

deleteData.title: Cima Idatha Yam
deleteData.description: Unelungelo lokucela ukucinywa kweakhawunti yakho nedatha yobuqu enxulumeneyo. Sicubungula izicelo zingaphakathi kweentsuku ezingama-30.
deleteData.successMessage: Isicelo sakho silungiselelwe. Nceda uthumele i-imeyile evuleke kwi-app yakho ye-imeyile. Siya kusicubungula zingaphakathi kweentsuku ezingama-30.
deleteData.scopeFull: Yonke into — cima iakhawunti yam nedatha yonke
deleteData.scopeData: Idatha kuphela — gcina iakhawunti kodwa ucime idatha yemisebenzi
deleteData.emailRequired: Nceda ufake i-imeyile enxulumene neakhawunti yakho.
